knownCaveats: Postgame cron scripts timed out at 120s; indexed state showed score/settle progress, and manual claim-all wrap-up completed remaining settlements/claims.

The first manual claim-all pass partially failed after settling pending markets because immediate follow-on claim/settle estimates saw stale or already-updated chain/API state; a repeat sweep completed successfully and final dry-runs were empty.

Telemetry reported PositionWithoutCommitment while polling wallet positions from earlier markets that were not in the current MM local commitment state; this did not hold quoting or leave live exposure.

Telemetry also reported UnexpectedFillStatus for disappeared commitments whose DB rows still showed status=open after expiry/cancel/fill classification; live-active checks still showed zero visible unfilled commitments at wrap-up.

The run used frozen SDK/CLI 0.2.1 and the then-current deployment. Phase 1.5 API fixes were merged during/after wrap-up, but package rebuild, tarball refresh, Heroku deployment, and MM re-pull remain separate next steps before more tests.

scope.purpose: Phase 1.5 evidence-driven market-maker shakeout across three MLB moneyline contests.
